title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 1
description: This is a Add-on for my texture pack Classic Improvemenst has extra stuff added like better clouds and etc!
body:
# If your looking for Classic Improvements [here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)

### **This Add-on has theses features**
 
+ Cat + Dog 

+ Better wither hearts 

+ More clouds

+ Fixed Diamond armor 

+ Infinite Amethyst [DISC]

+ Aria math [DISC]

### THE DETAIL ARMOR BARS VERISON ALSO INCLUDS

BETTER DETAIL ARMOR BARS 

## WARNINGS

TO FIX THE TEXT FOR THE ADD ON [HERE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-improvements-fixes/versions)

INFINITE AMETHYST REPLACES DISC 11

ARIA MATH DISC REPLACES DISC 13

FOR THE DETAIL ARMOR BARS VERISON THIS MOD IS REQUIRED FOR IT TO WORK FULLY OR YOU WILL JUST HAVE THE BETTER IRON BARS  [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar)

**THIS GO'S ABOVE CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS**
